seo.title: Azure Marketplace consulting - Publish & sell your app | SSW
seo.description: Sell your software on Azure Marketplace and win enterprise deals. SSW builds transactable offers, deploys to customer tenants, bills via Microsoft.

images.alt: Azure Marketplace consulting - Publish and sell your app

blocks.heading: Win enterprise deals with **your app on the Azure Marketplace.**
blocks.description: Enterprise buyers in healthcare, finance, and government care about trust, compliance, and data control, not just features. We help you publish a transactable Azure Marketplace offer that deploys straight into your customer's Azure tenant, so their data and infrastructure stay theirs.

features.heading: Sell where enterprises buy
features.description: List a transactable offer on Microsoft's marketplace and tap committed Azure spend.

features.heading: Compliance by design
features.description: Deploy into the customer's tenant so data residency, security, and ownership stay with them.

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by
Stop losing deals to **data residency and compliance.**
blocks.description: Traditional SaaS asks enterprise customers to hand their data to your environment. Many regulated buyers can't. With Azure Marketplace, your whole application deploys into the customer's Azure tenant, they keep full ownership of data and infrastructure, and Microsoft handles billing and monetization through Partner Center.

features.heading: Deploy into the customer's tenant
features.description: Your app runs in their Azure subscription, no data leaves their environment.

features.heading: Microsoft handles billing
features.description: Monetize through Partner Center while you focus on building great software.

blocks.heading: What we deliver
blocks.body: From first offer to co-sell, we get you transacting on Azure Marketplace.

accordionItems.label: Offer creation & Partner Center setup
accordionItems.content: We set up your Microsoft Partner Center, build your listing, and configure a transactable SaaS or Azure Application offer ready for enterprise buyers.

accordionItems.label: Deploy into the customer's tenant
accordionItems.content: We package your application so it deploys directly into the customer's Azure tenant, keeping their data, security, and compliance fully in their control.

accordionItems.label: Billing & monetization
accordionItems.content: We wire up metered or flat-rate billing through Microsoft, so you get paid automatically while Microsoft handles invoicing and collection.

accordionItems.label: Co-sell with Microsoft
accordionItems.content: We help you reach co-sell ready status so Microsoft sellers can put your solution in front of their enterprise customers.

cards.heading: Azure Consulting
cards.description: Landing zones, migration, modern apps, DevOps, security, and FinOps for your Azure estate.

cards.heading: Artificial Intelligence
cards.description: Build AI-powered products, like SSW's Eagle Eye, ready to ship to enterprise customers.

cards.heading: DevOps
cards.description: CI/CD pipelines and automation to package and ship your marketplace offer reliably.

blocks.heading: Talk to us about getting on the Azure Marketplace
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can help.
